title: Tatanagar–SMVT Bengaluru Weekly Superfast Express
summary: The 12889 / 12890 Tatanagar–SMVT Bengaluru Weekly Superfast Express is a Superfast Express train belonging to South Eastern Railway zone that runs between Tatanagar Junction and Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal, Bengaluru in India. It is currently being operated on a weekly basis.
text:
The 12889 / 12890 Tatanagar–SMVT Bengaluru Weekly Superfast Express is a Superfast Express train belonging to South Eastern Railway zone that runs between Tatanagar Junction and Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal, Bengaluru in India. It is currently being operated on a weekly basis.

Service
The 12889 Tatanagar – SMVT Bengaluru Superfast Express has an average speed of 55 km (34 mi) per hr and covers 1,884 km (1,171 mi) in 34h 25m. The 12890 SMVT Bengaluru – Tatanagar Superfast Express has an average speed of 55 km (34 mi) per hr and covers 1,748 km (1,086 mi) in 34h 30m.
It received New LHB coach from 11 April 2019. The Train 12889 Tatanagar – SMVT Bengaluru Superfast Express started to Terminate at the new Sir. M. Visvesvaraya Terminal, Bengaluru from 15 July 2022 instead of earlier Yesvantpur Junction. Similarly, Train 12890 SMVT Bengaluru – Tatanagar Superfast Express started its journey from the new Sir. M. Visvesvaraya Terminal, Bengaluru instead of earlier Yesvantpur Junction with effective from 18 July 2022.

Route and halts
The important halts of the train are:

Tatanagar Junction
Chakradharpur
Rourkela Junction
Jharsuguda Junction
Visakhapatnam Junction
Samalkot
Rajahmundry
Eluru
Vijayawada Junction
Ongole
Nellore
Gudur Junction
Renigunta Junction
Tirupati
Katpadi Junction
Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal

Coach composition
The train has modern LHB rakes with a max speed of 110 kmph. The train consists of 21 coaches:

3 AC II Tier
5 AC III Tier
3 AC III Economy
Pantry Car
6 Sleeper coaches
2 Second Class
2 EOG (End on Generation)

Traction
From Tatanagar to Visakhapatnam Junction, it is hauled by Tatanagar Based WAP 7 And from Visakhapatnam Junction To Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal by Lallaguda based WAP 7 .

Rake sharing
The train shared its rake with 18103/18104 Tatanagar–Amritsar Jallianwalla Bagh Express

Timing
12889 – starts from Tatanagar Junction every Friday at 5:45 PM and reaches Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal on 3rd day at 3:15 AM IST
12890 – starts from Sir M. Visvesvaraya Terminal every Monday at 8:50 AM and reaches Tatanagar Junction on 2nd day at 6:10 PM IST
